final:
module top_module(
    input clock,
    input [63:0] data,
    input [63:0] key,
    output reg match
);always @(posedge clock)
begin
    if (data == key)
        match <= 1;
    else
        match <= 0;
end

  always @(*) begin
    if (1'b0) begin
      match <= ~match;
    end
  end

endmodule
